design_concept: The Archive: A highly structured, encyclopedic directory for AI tools. Function-first, utilizing stark white backgrounds, heavy black typography, and structural grid lines. Color is used strictly for function (Signal Red for action, Archive Blue for metadata).

hierarchy.tag: text-xs font-mono font-bold px-2 py-1 uppercase

components.button_primary: bg-primary text-white font-bold tracking-wide uppercase px-6 py-3 border-2 border-transparent hover:border-black hover:bg-black hover:text-white transition-all duration-200
components.button_secondary: bg-transparent text-text_primary border-2 border-black font-bold uppercase tracking-wide px-6 py-3 hover:bg-black hover:text-white transition-all duration-200
components.card: bg-surface border-2 border-border_high_contrast p-6 transition-transform duration-200 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[6px_6px_0px_0px_rgba(10,10,10,1)]
components.input: bg-surface border-2 border-border_high_contrast px-4 py-3 font-mono text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 focus:border-secondary transition-colors
components.badge: border border-border_high_contrast px-2 py-1 text-xs font-mono uppercase bg-white
components.header: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-background/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-b-2 border-border_high_contrast
components.chat_widget: fixed bottom-8 right-8 w-16 h-16 bg-black border-2 border-white rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-white shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.2)] hover:scale-105 transition-transform z-50 cursor-pointer

homepage.hero: Massive typography left-aligned. 'THE INDEX OF AI'. Large full-width search input with command-palette style (Cmd+K). Background features subtle geometric architectural grid pattern.
homepage.featured_tools: Bento grid of cards. Tool logo, mono font tags (pricing, category), bold description.
homepage.categories: List view or dense grid with monospace numbering. '01. Marketing', '02. Development'.

tool_directory.layout: Sidebar for filters (checkboxes, price ranges). Main area for tool cards in a responsive grid. Dynamic and data-driven.

tool_detail.layout: 2-column layout. Left: Tool Title, Breadcrumbs, full description, 'Best Prompts' section styled like terminal/code blocks. Right: Sticky panel with 'Visit Tool' primary CTA, pricing details, and 'Free Alternatives' list.

profession_guides.layout: Magazine editorial layout. Large hero image (e.g., Student in library). Content blocks with 'Recommended Stack' cards embedded inside the text.

hero_background.description: Abstract geometric architecture used as a subtle, low-opacity background for the hero section to establish the 'Archive/Index' structural theme.

professions.description: Freelancer working remotely in a cafe.

placeholders.description: Vintage cabinet used for generic tool cover placeholders.

motion.hover: Instant, snappy transitions for colors. Transform/translate with a 0.2s ease-out for neo-brutalist cards.
motion.page_load: Staggered fade-up for grid items. Minimalistic and fast.
motion.marquee: Slow, constant scrolling for trending tools or 'Supported by' logos, using a monospace font.

accessibility_and_testing.testing_ids: All interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs) MUST have a data-testid attribute in kebab-case. Example: data-testid='hero-search-input'.
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: All text must pass WCAG AA (4.5:1). Black text on white/off-white easily passes.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Shadcn UI components but strip away default border-radii (make them rounded-none) and apply the solid border/brutalist shadow classes.
Implement fluid typography using clamp() or Tailwind text scales as defined in the hierarchy.
Ensure all grid layouts use the 'Control Room' dense bento pattern.
Include a Floating Action Button for the AI Chatbot widget.
Apply 'data-testid' to all key components as required.
